title: diuranthera major
intro: Diuranthera major, also known as Huang Jing or Mountain Barberry, is a type of flowering plant native to China. This perennial plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The root of the Diuranthera major plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving immune function. Diuranthera major can be prepared as a decoction or a tea, and is also used in the form of capsules or tablets in modern herbal preparations.
